statements.action_statement: Docker Compose v5.2.0, docker/buildx v0.35.0, and their respective upstream main branches currently embed github.com/docker/docker v28.5.2, and github.com/docker/docker does not publish v29.x Go module tags. Revisit when a scanner-visible fixed module version exists to bump to instead (see #787 for why docker-buildx was added here: unlike containerd/containerd/v2, which buildx's build now bumps directly, docker/docker genuinely cannot be bumped the same way). (Accepted, tracked risk recorded in .trivyignore.yaml; this disposition expires 2026-08-15 and must be re-reviewed on or before that date.)
